title: Viewer pages should lead with action metrics
summary: Viewer pages should not make users infer value from raw lists. Overview, Memory, Owners, Review, and Proof should lead with compact charts tied to decisions: memory grounding, source map coverage, handoff blockers, owner
body:
Viewer pages should not make users infer value from raw lists. Overview, Memory, Owners, Review, and Proof should lead with compact charts tied to decisions: memory grounding, source-map coverage, handoff blockers, ownership concentration, memory quality, and benchmark gates. Debug should be labeled as raw artifact inspection, not a normal workflow.
Verified by: Playwright desktop/mobile page checks for Overview, Graph, Memory, Owners, Intel, Review, Debug and homepage; npm test --prefix mcp
